PostToolUse.command: echo '[OpenUI Forge] Component written. Remember to add it to your library and regenerate the system prompt with /openui:prompt'
echo '[OpenUI Forge] Library updated. Regenerate system prompt: npx @openuidev/cli generate ./src/lib/library.ts --out src/generated/system-prompt.txt'

PreToolUse.command: echo '[OpenUI Forge] WARNING: Deleting system prompt file. The frontend will break without it.' && exit 1
